failure_modes.text: A team can spend energy managing impressions instead of surfacing the truth that would actually let the work improve.
failure_modes.mitigation: Establish constructive confrontation as a team norm so every hypothesis meets its antithesis; make it safe to surface uncomfortable truths.

failure_modes.text: Style can outrun substance when authentic tone is not matched by domain knowledge, factual grounding, or implementation realism.
failure_modes.mitigation: Use the Feynman technique: force simplification and self-explanation to identify gaps where authentic conviction is substituting for verified knowledge.

failure_modes.text: Authenticity can become a cover for subjectivity if the inside view is never disciplined by outside-view evidence.
failure_modes.mitigation: Anchor to the outside view: actively seek and integrate external perspectives and reference-class data before trusting the authentic inside-view narrative.

premortem_questions.text: What conclusions would unbiased others draw if they saw the exact same facts?
premortem_questions.source_quote: What conclusions would unbiased others draw if they saw the exact same facts?

premortem_questions.text: Can I explain this idea in two simple sentences without jargon and still preserve what is true?
premortem_questions.source_quote: Can I explain this idea in two simple sentences that a five-year-old would understand, without resorting to jargon?

premortem_questions.text: Am I focused on executing the process effectively, or only on how I will feel about the outcome?
premortem_questions.source_quote: Am I focused on how I will feel about the outcome (success/failure), or am I fully focused on executing the process effectively?

heuristics.text: Put real-time internal experience into words when that honesty helps the other side see the actual problem more clearly.
Use radical truth and transparency to reduce the hidden workload of impression management.
Reduce the message to the essential core so candor is not buried under complexity theater.

curation_notes.summary: The source is strongest on grounded candor, anti-impression-management discipline, and outside-view checks on subjective truth.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor self-expression sprawl beyond the raw source's clearer transparency, simplicity, and anti-style-without-substance material.
open_questions: The second premortem question uses the source's Feynman-style mitigation language so the check stays operational rather than philosophical.

allies: The raw allies section is strong on radical transparency, metacognition, storytelling, and simplicity.
antagonists: The raw antagonists section is strongest on cognitive dissonance, curse-of-knowledge, and lazy defensive thinking.
structured_tensions: The source has strong tension material around motivated reasoning and inside-view bias, but it does not present a clean explicit current-vocabulary tension block.
